firestore.description: Schema for real-time operational data, designed for low-latency access by the platform's microservices.

collections.name: clients
collections.description: Stores core information about client entities (e.g., IBCs).

subcollections.name: beneficial_owners
subcollections.description: Stores information about the beneficial owners of a client entity, as per the BO Act.

fields.name: fullName
fields.description: The full legal name of the beneficial owner.

fields.name: residentialAddress
fields.description: The primary residential address of the beneficial owner.

fields.name: serviceAddress
fields.description: The address for service of legal documents.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.description: The beneficial owner's date of birth.

fields.name: nationality
fields.description: The beneficial owner's nationality as an ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code.

fields.name: nationalIdNumber
fields.description: The national identification number from the BO's identity document.

fields.name: taxIdNumber
fields.description: The tax identification number (TIN) for the beneficial owner.

fields.name: dateBecameBo
fields.description: The date on which the individual became a beneficial owner.

collections.name: str_cases
collections.description: Stores information related to Suspicious Transaction Reports (STRs) being managed by a Compliance Officer.

fields.name: clientId
fields.description: A reference to the ID of the client entity involved in the STR.

fields.name: caseStatus
fields.description: The current workflow status of the STR case.

fields.name: suspicionNarrative
fields.description: The detailed narrative explaining the grounds for suspicion, as drafted by the Compliance Officer.

bigquery.description: Schema for the analytical data warehouse, designed for reporting, monitoring, and long-term immutable storage.

tables.name: beneficial_owners_history
tables.description: An immutable, append-only log of all beneficial owner data ever recorded, providing a complete audit trail.

schema.name: snapshot_timestamp
schema.description: The timestamp when this record was written, ensuring immutability.

tables.name: str_cases_history
tables.description: An immutable, append-only log of all STR case data.

schema.name: submission_timestamp
schema.description: The timestamp when the case was officially submitted to the FIU.

schema.name: snapshot_timestamp
schema.description: The timestamp when this record was written, ensuring immutability.
